blockers.expected_action: Promote KOSIS from metadata-only to bounded sample-call verification after sample parameters and credential policy are pinned.
Register a KOSIS adapter with verification and call capabilities before runtime evidence can be generated.
Define a non-secret API key injection path for source-scoped CI and local bounded checks.

next_evidence_plan.first_batch_policy: Run a credential-gated bounded sample-call batch only after sample orgId/tblId/statId/period parameters are pinned.
next_evidence_plan.promotion_gate: Do not promote KOSIS datasets beyond registry_only until runtime evidence and table mapping contracts exist.

warnings.expected: KOSIS has source-scoped runtime evidence after the pinned candidate batch, adapter, and credential injection are available.
warnings.actual: 0 runtime checks are collected for KOSIS.
warnings.remaining: Use reports/kosis/runtime-candidates.json with a registered adapter and credentials to run the first bounded verification batch.

warnings.expected: KOSIS adapter has verification and call capabilities.
warnings.actual: adapter.status is none and adapter_capabilities is empty.
